entry.title: Publication
entry.summary:
2022

Fengyu Yue, Yong Wang. "Cross-Domain Fault Diagnosis Via Meta-Learning-Based Domain Generalization." 2022 IEEE 18th International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE 2022), Mexico City, Mexico. (Accepted)

Fengyu Yue, Ye Wang, Yong Wang, Bing Li, Renkai Chang, "A Novel State Estimator Based on Algebraic Parametric Method." 2023 35th Chinese Control and Decision Conference} (CCDC 2023). (Accepted)
entry.content:
2022

Fengyu Yue, Yong Wang. "Cross-Domain Fault Diagnosis Via Meta-Learning-Based Domain Generalization." 2022 IEEE 18th International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE 2022), Mexico City, Mexico. (Accepted)

Fengyu Yue, Ye Wang, Yong Wang, Bing Li, Renkai Chang, "A Novel State Estimator Based on Algebraic Parametric Method." 2023 35th Chinese Control and Decision Conference} (CCDC 2023). (Accepted)

entry.title: Presentation
entry.content: CASE 2022: Presented our CASE paper online

entry.title: Project
entry.content:
• Design and Implementation of A Domain-Generalization-based Cross-Domain Intelligent Fault Diagnosis System for Bearings
  • Machine learning for classifying images by feature engineering
  • Research and Application of Optimal Dispatching Technology for Pumping Station
  • A Novel State Estimator Based on Algebraic Parametric Method
  • Research on UAV landing technology based on satellite-inertial navigation combined guidance

entry.title: Fengyu Yue 岳凤玉
entry.summary:
Ms. Fengyu Yue is now a PhD student at the Faculty of Aerospace Engineering, Israel Institute of Technology (Technion) supervised by Prof. Daniel Zelazo.
She received a Bachelor's degree in Automation Engineering from the Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics (NUAA) in 2020, and a Master's degree in Electronic and Information Engineering from the University of Science and Technology of China (USTC) in 2023.
entry.content:
Ms. Fengyu Yue is now a PhD student at the Faculty of Aerospace Engineering, Israel Institute of Technology (Technion) supervised by Prof. Daniel Zelazo.
She received a Bachelor's degree in Automation Engineering from the Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics (NUAA) in 2020, and a Master's degree in Electronic and Information Engineering from the University of Science and Technology of China (USTC) in 2023.

Education

--Jan 2024 -- Now
PhD
Technion, Israel
Faculty of Aerospace Enginnering
Advisor: Prof. Daniel Zelazo

  • Sep 2020 -- Jun 2023
    Master of Engineering
    Majoring in Electronic and Information Engineering
    University of Science and Technology of China (USTC), China
    Department of Automation
    Advisor: Prof. Yong Wang

  • Sep 2016 -- Jun 2020
    Bachelor of Engineering with Honor
    Majored in Automation Engineering
    Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics (NUAA), China

Experience

  • Oct 2023 -- Jan 2024
    Research Student
    Israel Institute of Technology(Technion), Israel
    Faulty of Aerospace Engineering
    Advisor: Prof. Daniel Zelazo

  • Nov 2021 -- Dec 2021
    NII-USTC Sakura Science Plan Online
    National Insititute of Informatics (NII), Japan
    Mentor: Prof. YAMADA Seiji

Research Interests

Her research focuses on graph theory, multiagent systems, control theroy.
